Package com.longbridge.fundamental

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    BusinessSegmentHistoryItem
    One business/regional segment item in a historical snapshot.
    BusinessSegmentItem
    One business segment item (latest snapshot).
    BusinessSegments
    Response for FundamentalContext.getBusinessSegments(java.lang.String).
    BusinessSegmentsHistoricalItem
    One historical business segments snapshot.
    BusinessSegmentsHistory
    Response for FundamentalContext.getBusinessSegmentsHistory(com.longbridge.fundamental.BusinessSegmentsHistoryOptions).
    BusinessSegmentsHistoryOptions
    Options for FundamentalContext.getBusinessSegmentsHistory(com.longbridge.fundamental.BusinessSegmentsHistoryOptions).
    BuybackData
    Response for FundamentalContext.getBuyback(java.lang.String).
    BuybackHistoryItem
    Historical annual buyback data point for BuybackData.
    BuybackRatios
    Buyback payout and cash-flow ratios for BuybackData.
    CompanyOverview
    Overview information for a listed company.
    ConsensusDetail
    Consensus estimate for one financial metric within a fiscal period.
    ConsensusReport
    Consensus report for one fiscal period.
    CorpActionItem
    One corporate action event.
    CorpActionLive
    Live stream associated with a corporate action.
    CorpActions
    Response containing corporate action events for a security.
    DividendItem
    A single dividend / distribution event.
    DividendList
    Response containing dividend / distribution events for a security.
    ExecutiveGroup
    Executives for one security.
    ExecutiveList
    Response containing executive groups (usually one per queried security).
    FinancialConsensus
    Financial consensus estimates response for a security.
    FinancialReportOptions
    Options for FundamentalContext.getFinancialReport(java.lang.String, com.longbridge.fundamental.FinancialReportOptions)
    FinancialReports
    Raw financial report data for a security.
    FinancialReportSnapshot
    Response for FundamentalContext.getFinancialReportSnapshot(com.longbridge.fundamental.FinancialReportSnapshotOptions).
    FinancialReportSnapshotOptions
    Options for FundamentalContext.getFinancialReportSnapshot(com.longbridge.fundamental.FinancialReportSnapshotOptions).
    ForecastEps
    EPS forecast snapshots for a security.
    ForecastEpsItem
    One EPS forecast snapshot covering a specific forecast window.
    FundamentalContext
    Fundamental data context — financial reports, analyst ratings, dividends, valuation, company overview and more.
    FundHolder
    A fund or ETF that holds the queried security.
    FundHolders
    Response containing funds and ETFs that hold the queried security.
    IndustryPeerNode
    A node in the recursive industry peer chain.
    IndustryPeersOptions
    Options for FundamentalContext.getIndustryPeers(com.longbridge.fundamental.IndustryPeersOptions).
    IndustryPeersResponse
    Response for FundamentalContext.getIndustryPeers(com.longbridge.fundamental.IndustryPeersOptions).
    IndustryPeersTop
    Top-level industry info in the peers response.
    IndustryRankGroup
    A group of ranked industry items.
    IndustryRankItem
    One ranked industry item.
    IndustryRankOptions
    Options for FundamentalContext.getIndustryRank(com.longbridge.fundamental.IndustryRankOptions).
    IndustryRankResponse
    Response for FundamentalContext.getIndustryRank(com.longbridge.fundamental.IndustryRankOptions).
    IndustryValuationDist
    Valuation ratio distributions for an industry, used for percentile ranking.
    IndustryValuationHistory
    Historical valuation snapshot for an industry peer.
    IndustryValuationItem
    Valuation data for one peer security within an industry.
    IndustryValuationList
    List of peer securities with their valuation data for an industry comparison.
    InstitutionRating
    Combined analyst-rating response for a security.
    InstitutionRatingDetail
    Detailed historical analyst rating data for a security.
    InstitutionRatingDetailEvaluate
    Historical rating distribution time-series for a security.
    InstitutionRatingDetailEvaluateItem
    One weekly analyst rating distribution snapshot.
    InstitutionRatingDetailTarget
    Historical analyst target price time-series for a security.
    InstitutionRatingDetailTargetItem
    One weekly analyst target price snapshot.
    InstitutionRatingLatest
    Latest analyst-rating snapshot for a security.
    InstitutionRatingSummary
    Consensus analyst-rating summary for a security.
    InstitutionRatingViewItem
    One historical rating distribution snapshot.
    InstitutionRatingViews
    Response for FundamentalContext.getInstitutionRatingViews(java.lang.String).
    InvestRelations
    Securities in which the queried company holds a stake.
    InvestSecurity
    A security in which the queried company has an investment stake.
    Macroeconomic
    One historical data point for a macroeconomic indicator.
    MacroeconomicIndicator
    Metadata for one macroeconomic indicator.
    MacroeconomicIndicatorListResponse
    Response for FundamentalContext.getMacroeconomicIndicators(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.Integer, java.lang.Integer).
    MacroeconomicResponse
    Response for FundamentalContext.getMacroeconomic(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.Integer, java.lang.Integer).
    MultiLanguageText
    Localized text in simplified Chinese, traditional Chinese, and English.
    OperatingFinancial
    Key financial metrics extracted from an operating report.
    OperatingIndicator
    One financial indicator in an operating report.
    OperatingItem
    One operating summary report (annual or quarterly).
    OperatingList
    Response containing operating summary reports for a security.
    Professional
    One executive or board member of a company.
    RatingCategory
    One rating category (e.g. growth, profitability) for StockRatings.
    RatingEvaluate
    Analyst rating distribution counts for a security.
    RatingIndicator
    A rating indicator node for RatingSubIndicatorGroup.
    RatingLeafIndicator
    A leaf rating indicator with a raw value for RatingSubIndicatorGroup.
    RatingSubIndicatorGroup
    A group of sub-indicators under one category indicator for RatingCategory.
    RatingSummaryEvaluate
    Simplified analyst rating distribution for the consensus summary.
    RatingTarget
    Analyst target price range for a security.
    RecentBuybacks
    TTM buyback summary for BuybackData.
    Shareholder
    One major shareholder of a security.
    ShareholderDetailOptions
    Options for FundamentalContext.getShareholderDetail(com.longbridge.fundamental.ShareholderDetailOptions).
    ShareholderDetailResponse
    Response for FundamentalContext.getShareholderDetail(com.longbridge.fundamental.ShareholderDetailOptions).
    ShareholderList
    Response containing major shareholders of a security.
    ShareholderStock
    A security in an institutional shareholder's cross-holdings.
    ShareholderTopResponse
    Response for FundamentalContext.getShareholderTop(java.lang.String).
    SnapshotForecastMetric
    A forecast metric in the financial report snapshot.
    SnapshotReportedMetric
    A reported metric in the financial report snapshot.
    StockRatings
    Response for FundamentalContext.getRatings(java.lang.String).
    ValuationComparisonItem
    One security in the valuation comparison.
    ValuationComparisonOptions
    Options for FundamentalContext.getValuationComparison(com.longbridge.fundamental.ValuationComparisonOptions).
    ValuationComparisonResponse
    Response for FundamentalContext.getValuationComparison(com.longbridge.fundamental.ValuationComparisonOptions).
    ValuationData
    Valuation data response for a security.
    ValuationDist
    Distribution statistics for one valuation metric within an industry.
    ValuationHistoryData
    Container for historical valuation metrics.
    ValuationHistoryMetric
    Historical data for one valuation metric including statistical bounds.
    ValuationHistoryMetrics
    Historical valuation metrics container (PE / PB / PS).
    ValuationHistoryPoint
    One historical valuation data point.
    ValuationHistoryResponse
    Historical valuation response for a security.
    ValuationMetricData
    Historical time-series for one valuation metric.
    ValuationMetricsData
    Container for all valuation metrics (PE / PB / PS / dividend yield).
    ValuationPoint
    One valuation data point in a historical time-series.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    FinancialReportKind
    Financial report kind.
    FinancialReportPeriod
    Financial report period.
    InstitutionRecommend
    Institutional analyst recommendation.
